description: Core coverage (P1): board, columns, swimlanes, comments, categories, tags, subtasks, users, link types, and task links SDK resource modules + corresponding CLI command groups, and a comprehensive test pass targeting ≥90% coverage on src/kanboard/resources/.

userStories.title: Board resource — SDK
userStories.description: Implement src/kanboard/resources/board.py with BoardResource covering the single getBoard method. Wire into KanboardClient as client.board. The board response is a complex nested structure (columns → swimlanes → tasks); return it as a list[dict] rather than a typed model.
acceptanceCriteria: BoardResource class with __init__(self, client) pattern
get_board(project_id: int) -> list[dict]; returns [] on empty/falsy response
Raises KanboardAPIError on unexpected error responses
Wired into KanboardClient as self.board = BoardResource(self)
BoardResource importable from kanboard (added to __init__.py exports)
All public methods have docstrings and full type hints
Unit tests with pytest-httpx covering: successful response, empty board, error response
ruff check passes, pytest passes
userStories.notes: Foundation (M1) transport, models, and exceptions are already in place on main.

userStories.title: Board and Column CLI commands
userStories.description: Implement src/kanboard_cli/commands/board.py (1 command: show) and src/kanboard_cli/commands/column.py (6 subcommands: list, get, add, update, remove, move). Replace the stub board and column groups in main.py with real imports.
acceptanceCriteria: kanboard board show <project_id> renders the nested board structure
kanboard column list <project_id> lists all columns for a project
kanboard column get <column_id> shows column details
kanboard column add <project_id> <title> with optional --task-limit and --description
kanboard column update <column_id> <title> with optional --task-limit and --description
kanboard column remove <column_id> requires --yes confirmation
kanboard column move <project_id> <column_id> <position> changes column position
All commands support --output table/json/csv/quiet via inherited global option
Stub board and column groups in main.py replaced with real command module imports
CLI tests with CliRunner verify each command including the --yes confirmation flow
All public functions have docstrings
ruff check passes, pytest passes

userStories.title: Swimlane CLI commands
userStories.description: Implement src/kanboard_cli/commands/swimlane.py with 9 subcommands: list, get, get-by-name, add, update, remove, enable, disable, move. Replace the stub swimlane group in main.py with a real import.
acceptanceCriteria: kanboard swimlane list <project_id> lists active swimlanes; --all flag shows all swimlanes
kanboard swimlane get <swimlane_id> shows swimlane details
kanboard swimlane get-by-name <project_id> <name> looks up swimlane by name
kanboard swimlane add <project_id> <name> with optional --description
kanboard swimlane update <project_id> <swimlane_id> <name> with optional --description
kanboard swimlane remove <project_id> <swimlane_id> requires --yes confirmation
kanboard swimlane enable <project_id> <swimlane_id> enables a swimlane
kanboard swimlane disable <project_id> <swimlane_id> disables a swimlane
kanboard swimlane move <project_id> <swimlane_id> <position> changes swimlane position
All commands support --output table/json/csv/quiet via inherited global option
Stub swimlane group in main.py replaced with real command module import
CLI tests with CliRunner verify each command including the --yes confirmation flow
All public functions have docstrings
ruff check passes, pytest passes

userStories.title: User CLI commands
userStories.description: Implement src/kanboard_cli/commands/user.py with 9 subcommands: list, get, get-by-name, create, update, remove, enable, disable, is-active. Replace the stub user group in main.py with a real import. Password must use a hidden prompt when not provided via option.

kanboard user remove <user_id> requires --yes confirmation
kanboard user enable <user_id> enables a user
kanboard user disable <user_id> disables a user
kanboard user is-active <user_id> reports active status

userStories.title: Link type and task-link CLI commands

kanboard link update <link_id> <opposite_link_id> <label> updates a link type
kanboard link remove <link_id> requires --yes confirmation
kanboard task-link list <task_id> lists all task links for a task

kanboard task-link update <task_link_id> <task_id> <opposite_task_id> <link_id> updates a task link
kanboard task-link remove <task_link_id> requires --yes confirmation

userStories.title: Milestone 2 comprehensive test suite
userStories.description: Ensure all Milestone 2 SDK resource modules and CLI command groups have thorough test coverage. Add missing error-path tests, cross-format CLI output tests, and any coverage gaps identified by running coverage. Target ≥90% on src/kanboard/resources/.
acceptanceCriteria: pytest --cov=src/kanboard/resources reports ≥90% coverage
Error path tests exist for every resource: KanboardNotFoundError on null, KanboardAPIError on False, KanboardConnectionError on network failure
CLI tests verify all 4 output formats (table, json, csv, quiet) for at least one command per group
CLI tests verify --yes confirmation is required for all destructive commands in M2 command groups
Empty result tests: list commands render cleanly when API returns []
All new test files follow existing conventions (conftest fixtures, pytest-httpx mocking, CliRunner for CLI)
ruff check passes, pytest passes with all tests green
userStories.notes: This story closes the milestone. Run coverage before marking done.
